title: Invoice Desk
brief: Let a finance lead find an invoice, inspect it, and record a local payment while seeing invoice, customer, and collection totals update together.
audience: Finance leads reviewing the current collection at the start of the day.
scope: Client-side Invoices, Customers, and Collections navigation over one invoice fixture
Search, status filtering, and table or grid presentation for the invoice collection
Invoice detail Dialog with a client-only Mark as paid transition that updates derived balances and collection totals
boundaries: No payment processor, accounting service, or persistence is connected
Mark as paid changes are local to the current browser session
The fixture is illustrative and does not represent live accounts receivable
